title: dum enderman X Fresh Animations addon (FA)
description: a fresh aniamtions addon that makes enderman eyes go in different directions
body:
required: **[optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)**

a [**Fresh Animations**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) _addon_ that makes enderman eyes go in different directions. It looked funny for me idk.

it is fully **compatible** with resource packs that changes textures
